hero.title: Workspace analytics
hero.body: Review request volume, exchange outcomes, and recent active agents across your workspace.

requestVolume.title: Daily secret requests
requestVolume.body: Each bar shows the number of secret requests created on that day.

exchangeOutcomes.title: Successful, failed, and denied flows
exchangeOutcomes.body: Stacked columns show terminal exchange outcomes by day.

insights.title: What this window says
insights.body: Use this readout to distinguish normal workload from repeated failures or policy friction.
insights.requestPaceNoRequests: No request creation has been recorded in this window.
insights.requestPaceWithRequests: {{count}} requests were created across the selected period.
insights.exchangeHealthy: Successful exchange retrievals currently outweigh failed and denied paths.
insights.exchangeUnhealthy: Failed or denied exchanges are outpacing successful retrievals in this window.
insights.agentActivityActive: {{count}} distinct agents were active in the last {{hours}} hours.
insights.agentActivityNone: No agent activity has been recorded in the selected window.

loading.title: Loading workspace analytics
loading.body: Reading usage data from the workspace.

emptyState.title: No analytics traffic yet
emptyState.body: Once this workspace starts creating requests and completing exchanges, the charts will fill with daily activity.
